div.h2: Index Range Scan — WHERE price BETWEEN 10 AND 50
div.p: Descent to first key ≥ 10, then sequential leaf-chain traversal

g.text: Blue arrows | B+tree descent (root → internal → leaf)
Green border | Active scan path — keys in range [10, 50]
Green arrows | Leaf chain traversal (next_leaf pointer)
Red border | Stop condition — first key exceeding 50
Gray fill | Skipped page — all keys below range start
Orange box | Table heap lookup per matched rowid
INDEX LEAF — page 11 ◀ DESCENT LANDS HERE
7 total rowid lookups for 7 matching keys
